entity.summary: Multichain decentralized exchange and interoperability platform combining ElkDEX automated-market-maker trading, liquidity farming, cross-chain asset transfers, and developer-facing bridging and farming infrastructure.
entity.notes: Current first-party website lists DEX and liquidity-farming services as available products, identifies ElkDEX liquidity mining and a Uniswap v2-style AMM fee model, and links the live Elk dApp and exchange documentation. HEI consolidates Elk, Elk Finance, and chain-specific discovery rows into one entity.

evidence.title: ElkNet and ElkDEX products
evidence.notes: Current first-party website links DEX and liquidity farming, states that ELK is distributed through liquidity farming on ElkDEX, and describes the exchange as a Uniswap v2 AMM DEX whose trading fees flow to liquidity providers.

evidence.title: Elk Finance Documentation
evidence.notes: First-party documentation links the Exchange and Analytics products and documents Elk ecosystem liquidity, LP APIs, farming, contracts, and cross-chain operations.

evidence.title: Elk Finance application
evidence.notes: Current first-party Elk application endpoint is reachable and is linked from the live Elk Finance website and documentation as the active dApp/exchange surface.
